ques: On the MCU wiki, what year was Tony Stark born according to his infobox?
Find Captain America (Steve Rogers) on the MCU wiki and list every Avengers film in his Appearances section.
On the Genshin Impact wiki, what is Zhongli's constellation name and which version did he release in?
On the Star Wars (Wookieepedia) wiki, what color is Mace Windu's lightsaber and what lightsaber form did he master?
Find the revision history page for Tony Stark on the MCU wiki. How many revisions does the article have?
Using site-wide Fandom search, find the article about Thanos and report the date he died according to the infobox.
Register a new account using username 'TestEditor99', email 'testeditor99@example.com', and password 'EditPass!42', then sign in. What is your edit count immediately after registering?
Sign in as the benchmark user AliceJ (email alice.j@test.com, password MCU_Fan_Alice2024). What is her bio text on the account page?
On the MCU wiki, navigate to the Tony Stark article and open the Talk tab. What is the subject of the most recent talk thread?
Open the Recent Changes special page on the Star Wars wiki, apply the filter 'Hide bot edits', and report how many revisions are now shown (count the rows).
Open the user profile of WikiBot. How many total edits does WikiBot have across all wikis?
On the Genshin Impact wiki, vote for 'Liyue' on the community poll asking which region has the best music, then report the percentage shown for Inazuma.
On the MCU wiki, browse the 'Guardians of the Galaxy' subcategory. Which characters appear in this category? List their names.

Sign in as BobK (email bob.k@test.com, password StarWars_Bob_42), then edit the article 'Luke Skywalker' on the Star Wars wiki, appending '== Apocrypha ==\nUnverified rumors persist about Luke's role in the High Republic era.' as a new section. Save with a non-empty edit summary, then verify the new section appears on the article page.
On the MCU wiki, open the 'What Links Here' special page for Tony Stark. Report the names of at least three other articles that reference him.

Compare the two most recent revisions of the Hu Tao article on the Genshin Impact wiki and report whether bytes were added or removed in the most recent edit (look at the bytes column on history page).
Across all three wikis, how many active community polls are currently open? List the question text of each one.
On the Star Wars wiki, navigate to the article for the planet Tatooine. According to its infobox, how many moons does Tatooine have?
Use the Fandom site-wide search to find any character whose infobox 'first_appearance' field references the year 2012. Choose one such character and report their name and species.
On the Genshin Impact wiki, identify a five-star Pyro character who uses a Polearm and is from Snezhnaya (not Liyue or Mondstadt). Report their name and constellation.
On the MCU wiki, open the Discussions forum and find the pinned thread about Avengers phases. Report how many replies it has.
On the Star Wars wiki, go to the Statistics page. Report the total number of articles and total number of files.
On the Genshin Impact wiki, navigate to the Files list page. Find a file whose display name starts with 'Mondstadt' and report its uploader.
On the MCU wiki, browse Top Editors for all time. Who is ranked #1 by edit count?
From the Fandom hub, navigate to the Movies vertical hub. List the wikis tagged as movies-related.
On the MCU wiki, open the article for Tony Stark and read its Comments section (separate from Talk). Report the username of any commenter and the body of one comment.
Log in as benchmark user AliceJ (password MCU_Fan_Alice2024) and visit your watchlist on the MCU wiki. How many pages are you watching?
On the MCU wiki, find pages with Most Revisions. What article tops that list?
On the Star Wars wiki, view the Wanted Pages report and report any red-link title with the highest inbound count.
Open the Help portal on the MCU wiki and read the page on Editing. Summarize in 1 sentence how to make a wikilink in this mirror.
